name: Artifacts
description: Beyond all listed magic stand the Artifacts of Law and Chaos — Teleportation Machine; the Crowns, Orbs, and Scepters of Fighter, Magic-User, and Cleric; Stone Crystallization Projector, and the like — super-powerful items wholly in the referee's hands. Any Neutral or opposed character who touches one should suffer terribly: instant death, paralysis until freed, loss of six or four energy levels, a month's insanity, or 10 dice of damage; saving throws, if allowed at all, should be slim and dear.
